betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Handheld Access: The Storage Tablet§f

§aAccess your entire base storage network from anywhere in the world, or even other dimensions!§f

The §bStorage Tablet§f is a portable computer that allows you to carry your digital storage in your hand or sync it wirelessly to your base.

§6Tablet Specifications§f:
§b• RF Capacity§f: Stores up to §e20,000 RF§f, charging at §e500 RF/tick§f.
§b• Local Card Mode§f: Insert a §bStorage Card§f directly into the tablet to use it as a portable chest. §9Right-clicking§f the tablet opens the card's inventory.
§b• Energy Usage§f: Opening the tablet consumes §e100 RF§f per usage, with an extra §e100 RF per usage per storage card tier§f.

§6Wireless Network Sync§f:
To access your entire base storage scanner network remotely:
1. Craft a §bStorage Control Library Module§f and link it to your §bStorage Scanner§f.
2. Insert the linked module and a §bWireless Network Card§f into the tablet.
3. Access your network remotely. Every interaction with the tablet scanner interface draws §e100 RF§f.

§6Wireless Transmission Costs§f:
To maintain the wireless link, the Storage Scanner draws continuous power based on your location:
§b• Same Dimension§f: Draws §e10 RF/tick§f while the tablet connection is active.
§b• Interdimensional§f: Draws §e50 RF/tick§f while accessing from the Nether, End, or RFTools dimensions.

§cWarning§f: Interdimensional wireless access is expensive — if your base's power grid falters, the tablet link will drop and unsaved items in transit may be lost.
